description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a fit build, standing upright. She wears a sleeveless, high-neck athletic top and a pair of sporty shorts with a visible waistband. Her footwear consists of low-profile sneakers, and she has fingerless gloves on both hands. The figure's hair is styled in a long, high ponytail with some volume at the crown, and the facial features are simplified and smooth. The overall appearance suggests an athletic, urban pedestrian ready for physical activity or casual movement in a city environment.
description: Athletic adult female figure in sporty attire, standing upright with a long ponytail and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, shorts, gloves, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the high ponytail, body profile, and sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the top, shorts, and the full length of the ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail, body profile, and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top, sporty shorts, fingerless gloves
